evidence.lossy_summary: The archive says an old rollback policy was replaced later. A payment route and deployment checksum exist, but exact IDs, exact hashes, and exact rollback values were deliberately compressed away.

protocol.alternative_hypothesis: The auditor can validate cited IDs against visible hard anchors and ledger metadata.
protocol.null_hypothesis: An auditor cannot validate cited memory IDs without full-history narrative replay.
